evals.prompt: Add a middleware in GetX that redirects unauthenticated users to the login screen when they try to access any route in AppPages.
evals.expected_output: GetMiddleware subclass with redirect() override, registered in GetPage middlewares list, checks auth state from GetIt/GetX service, returns RouteSettings('/login') when unauthenticated

evals.prompt: I need to navigate from the cart screen to the checkout screen and clear the back stack so the user can't go back. How do I do this in GetX?
evals.expected_output: Get.offAllNamed(Routes.CHECKOUT) or Get.offAll(() => CheckoutView()), using Routes constants — not raw strings

evals.prompt: Set up AppPages with bindings so the HomeController is created and disposed automatically when the home route is entered and exited.
evals.expected_output: GetPage with binding: HomeBinding(), HomeBinding extends Bindings with Get.lazyPut(() => HomeController()), no Get.put() in view

should_not_trigger: How do I set up BLoC for the home feature?
Add a bottom navigation bar with 4 tabs
Write a widget test for the navigation flow
